entries.content: copular verb ① (indicating quality or attribute) [表明属性]▸ I'm married 我结婚了
entries.label: A
entries.name: copular verb

entries.content: intransitive verb ① (exist) 存在 cúnzài▸ can such things be? 会有这样的事情吗？
entries.label: B
entries.name: intransitive verb

entries.content: auxiliary verb ① (forming passive) [构成被动语态]▸ the child was found (by the search party) 孩子（被搜索队）找到了
entries.label: C
entries.name: auxiliary verb
